shakshi: The player returned to the ring cleared in 0035 — Kaganue has made it his, the demonic network reorganizes around cleared space
Kaganue met — Demon of Doublespeak, Ko's prophet, insane but not hostile. Says true things in a way that makes them sound false.
The conversation ran its course — the player had to hold the register long enough to hear what was actually being said
Ko was the Sun, she died, she became the Moon — cosmological fact delivered by a madman who cannot lie even when he sounds like he is
Ko as a death and continuation — what she is now is what survived the dying. Every Ko encounter reads differently from here.
The truth sounds like a lie because it is too large — the player may not believe it at first even though they heard it clearly
The Sun is gone, the Moon is what remains — the ground of Ko's dream sequences has always been a death. The calibration sessions were always with a survivor.
